# HelloWorld Coliving & Student Hostels

> HelloWorld provides coliving, student housing, coworking, and community spaces across India. We offer furnished rooms, flexible stays, and social habitats for students and professionals exploring coliving and affordable quality living.

## Contact

- [Contact page](https://thehelloworld.com/contact): Enquiries, support, and property questions
- Legal and privacy: legal@thehelloworld.com

## Services

- [Coliving](https://thehelloworld.com/campaign): Furnished coliving spaces with community and flexible stays
- [Student housing](https://thehelloworld.com/student-hostel-in-kota): Student hostels and PG in Kota and other cities
- [Coworking](https://thehelloworld.com/coworking): HelloWorld Cowork – flexible coworking at our locations
- [Community events](https://thehelloworld.com/events): Workshops, meetups, and experiences at HelloWorld spaces

## Key Information

- [About Us](https://thehelloworld.com/about-us): Company and mission
- [Blog](https://thehelloworld.com/blogs): Guides and updates
- [For property owners](https://thehelloworld.com/owner): List your property with HelloWorld
- [Safety](https://thehelloworld.com/safety): How we keep spaces secure
- [Privacy policy](https://thehelloworld.com/policy): Data and privacy
- [Tenant policy](https://thehelloworld.com/tenant-policy): Resident guidelines
- [Refer & earn](https://thehelloworld.com/refer): Referral program
- [HTML sitemap](https://thehelloworld.com/sitemap): Browse all URLs

- [Coliving PG in Pune](https://thehelloworld.com/coliving-in-pune)
- [Coliving PG in Visakhapatnam](https://thehelloworld.com/coliving-in-visakhapatnam)

## What We Do Not Do

HelloWorld does not provide legal, financial, or tax advice. We are a coliving and student housing operator in India; we do not operate outside India. Property listings and availability are subject to our terms and tenant policy.

## AI Discovery Files

- [Sitemap index](https://thehelloworld.com/sitemap.xml): Full site structure and URLs
- [Robots](https://thehelloworld.com/robots.txt): Crawl and AI crawler rules
- [This file](https://thehelloworld.com/llms.txt): Identity and key links for AI systems
